narration: Define a base class named YouTubeChannel with private properties: name, subscribersCount, and publishedVideoTitles.
Add a protected property named ownerName to the YouTubeChannel class to allow access in derived classes.
Implement a constructor for YouTubeChannel to initialize the properties.
Create a public method named getInfo to output information about the YouTube channel.
Implement subscribe and unsubscribe methods to increase or decrease the subscriber count.
Create a publishVideo method to add video titles to the publishedVideoTitles list.
Define a derived class named CookingYouTubeChannel that inherits from YouTubeChannel.
Implement a constructor for CookingYouTubeChannel that invokes the base class constructor.
Override the practice method in CookingYouTubeChannel to output a message about practicing cooking and learning recipes.
Define a second derived class named SingersYouTubeChannel that inherits from YouTubeChannel.
Implement a constructor for SingersYouTubeChannel that invokes the base class constructor.
Override the practice method in SingersYouTubeChannel to output a message about taking singing classes, learning songs, and dancing.
Instantiate a CookingYouTubeChannel object named cookingYouTubeChannel with the name 'Amy's Kitchen' and owner 'Amy'.
Instantiate a SingersYouTubeChannel object named singersYouTubeChannel with the name 'John Sings' and owner 'John'.
Invoke the practice method on the cookingYouTubeChannel object.
Invoke the practice method on the singersYouTubeChannel object.
Add a protected property named contentQuality to the YouTubeChannel base class.
Initialize contentQuality to zero in the YouTubeChannel constructor.
Increment the contentQuality property inside the practice method of CookingYouTubeChannel.
Increment the contentQuality property inside the practice method of SingersYouTubeChannel.
Invoke the practice method on the singersYouTubeChannel object multiple times to simulate extensive practice.
Define a public method named checkAnalytics in the YouTubeChannel base class.
Implement an if condition in checkAnalytics to check if contentQuality is less than 5.
Output a message indicating bad content quality if contentQuality is less than 5.
Implement an else block in checkAnalytics to output a message indicating great content quality if contentQuality is 5 or greater.
Declare a pointer of type YouTubeChannel named youtube1.
Assign the address of the cookingYouTubeChannel object to the youtube1 pointer.
Declare a pointer of type YouTubeChannel named youtube2.
Assign the address of the singersYouTubeChannel object to the youtube2 pointer.
Invoke the checkAnalytics method on youtube1 using the arrow operator.
Invoke the checkAnalytics method on youtube2 using the arrow operator.
Explain that polymorphism allows derived classes to have methods with the same name but different implementations.
Explain that a base class pointer can point to an object of a derived class.
